name: ecommerce-platform
description: Enterprise-Grade E-Commerce Platform for Vietnamese Market
author: TamHocDev

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=backend & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=backend && npm run format --workspace=frontend
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t ecommerce-backend:latest ./backend && docker build -t ecommerce-frontend:latest ./frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev && cd ..
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed && cd ..
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset && cd ..
